query: I'm building a SaaS dashboard for my agency clients and want to make sure they actually engage with it weekly. The current version they barely open. Stack is Next.js 16 + Tailwind + shadcn. Can you design v2?
Сверстай мне страницу подписки для приложения медитации — у нас три тарифа (Basic $5, Plus $12, Premium $25), нужно чтобы как можно больше юзеров шли на Plus тариф а не на Basic
We're losing 60% of users in onboarding. Can you redesign the first 3 screens? It's a React Native fitness app, target audience is 35-55 year olds trying fitness apps for the first time
lay out a pricing page for my open-source SaaS tool. Free tier, $20 Team tier, $200 Enterprise. Need to maximize conversions specifically on the Team tier
I need to design a checkout flow for a $400 piece of furniture. Users currently abandon at the address-entry step. Stack: Next.js + Tailwind + shadcn
build a paywall screen for our iOS app — currently only 1.2% convert from free to paid. Users see it after about 8 sessions in the app on average
I want to redesign the empty state for our analytics dashboard. New users see zero data on first login and ~40% never come back. SwiftUI for iPad
помоги спроектировать landing для запуска нашего SaaS на ProductHunt — нужно конвертить трафик любопытных в реальных подписавшихся юзеров
spec out a marketing site for our YC W26 application — the design itself needs to convince investors we have product-market fit and serious aesthetic chops
design a settings page for my mobile app — users currently can't find the notification toggle and it generates 80% of support tickets. iOS native SwiftUI
add a button to my Next.js page, just need the shadcn Button component installed and a click handler that toasts 'Saved'
what are the 5 most important UX principles to remember when designing forms in general? Just want the principles, not a specific design
I need a quick mockup of a landing page just so I can show my designer roughly what I want — don't care about psychology, just a visual sketch
explain Hick's Law and how it applies in general to product design
install the aceternity bento-grid component into my Next.js project — here's the path: src/components/ui/, please run the install command
review my existing pricing page React code at app/pricing/page.tsx and tell me if it follows React 19 best practices and has any performance issues
what's the typical conversion rate for SaaS landing pages in fintech and how does it compare to e-commerce — looking for industry benchmarks
fix the bug in my modal where ESC key doesn't close it. The modal is at components/dialogs/ConfirmDialog.tsx and uses @radix-ui/react-dialog
what font should I use for a legal terms-of-service document — just the typography choice, no design needed, the page already exists
generate JSON-LD schema markup for my pricing page at example.com/pricing so it shows up properly in Google search results
